data.content: Implemented Claude managed-skill project scoping only. Removed all Knots fallback/use of ~/.claude for Claude commands and doctor flows, updated unit and CLI coverage for project-root-only behavior, and updated README guidance. Validation: cargo test managed_skills; cargo test --test cli_skills; make install-hooks; make sanity. Branch: knots-0801-claude-project-skills. Commit: ef97c08e3abc.
